metadata.description: Public React Native and Expo skill plugins for AI agents

plugins.name: expo-platform
plugins.description: Core Expo engineering skills for app architecture, EAS, updates, config, and permissions.

plugins.name: react-native-cli-platform
plugins.description: Core bare React Native CLI skills for native modules, builds, signing, and debugging.

plugins.name: mobile-advanced-controls
plugins.description: Focused advanced skills for state, navigation, forms, animations, testing, and list performance.

plugins.name: mobile-identity-security
plugins.description: Authentication, token lifecycle, secure storage, and biometric control skills.

plugins.name: mobile-data-platform
plugins.description: API/query architecture, offline sync/conflict, and realtime communication skills.

plugins.name: mobile-observability-reliability
plugins.description: Logging, crash analytics, alerting policy, and incident response skills.

plugins.name: mobile-platform-architecture
plugins.description: Monorepo, shared packages, UI kit boundaries, and versioning strategy skills.

plugins.name: mobile-user-experience-quality
plugins.description: Accessibility, internationalization, background tasks, and notifications skills.

plugins.name: mobile-revenue-systems
plugins.description: Payments, subscriptions, entitlements, and billing recovery skills.

plugins.name: mobile-delivery-lifecycle
plugins.description: CI/CD workflow engineering and React Native/Expo migration playbook skills.
